GlobalPolicy.module-level-focus: Fast deterministic unit checks for each module.
GlobalPolicy.wave-level-focus: Integration checks across pipeline stages with synthetic videos.
GlobalPolicy.phase-level-focus: Synthetic video end-to-end tests with metric assertions.
GlobalPolicy.gui-testing-focus: Headless-compatible smoke tests (QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen). Worker signal tests with QSignalSpy. Widget rendering tests limited by CI constraints.
GlobalPolicy.redaction: Never log secrets, credentials, or raw high-risk payloads.

VF-001.NAME: DetectHappyPath
VF-001.scenario: User provides valid MP4 + SRT — pipeline produces slides.json + images with correct intervals.
VF-001.expected-outcome: slides.json validates, slide images saved, transcript aligned.

VF-002.NAME: ExportMDPath
VF-002.scenario: Valid slides.json → deck.md with correct Marp formatting.

VF-003.NAME: GPUAutoFallback
VF-003.scenario: System without CUDA — auto backend falls back to OpenCV with warning.
VF-003.expected-outcome: Pipeline completes on CPU with WARNING log line.

VF-004.NAME: ExportPptxPath
VF-004.scenario: Valid slides.json + images → deck.pptx with full-slide pictures and speaker notes.
VF-004.expected-outcome: deck.pptx has correct slide count, notes contain cleaned transcript, images embedded.

VF-005.NAME: NotesProcessingPath
VF-005.scenario: Segment with SRT cues → process_notes(basic) → clean speaker notes text.
VF-005.expected-outcome: Raw subtitle fragments joined, punctuated, deduplicated into flowing text.

VF-006.NAME: DetectSlidesNoSubtitles
VF-006.scenario: User runs detect-slides with only a video — no subtitles.
VF-006.expected-outcome: slides.json produced with intervals and representative timestamps. Transcript fields may be empty. No error.

VF-007.NAME: NotesPostProcess
VF-007.scenario: User runs detect first, then later runs notes with different subtitles/notes-mode. No video re-decode.
VF-007.expected-outcome: Notes command loads existing slides.json, aligns new subtitles, generates notes, saves. Runs in seconds, not minutes.

VF-008.NAME: RoiToolVisualSelect
VF-008.scenario: User runs roi-tool with a video, drags a rectangle, presses Enter.
VF-008.expected-outcome: Coordinates printed to stdout in format x1,y1,x2,y2. Window closes cleanly.

VF-009.NAME: ProjectCreateOpen
VF-009.scenario: User creates project with video + subtitles, then opens it.
VF-009.expected-outcome: project.json created with correct schema. On open, paths resolve, configs load. State round-trips correctly.

VF-010.NAME: DetectInProject
VF-010.scenario: User opens a project with video, clicks Detect in GUI. No UI freeze.
VF-010.expected-outcome: Worker emits progress signals. After completion, timeline appears. project.json state updated. slides.json valid.

VF-011.NAME: TimelineInteraction
VF-011.scenario: After detection, user clicks slide blocks on timeline, sees subtitle text.
VF-011.expected-outcome: Timeline shows correct number of blocks matching slide count. Clicking each block displays correct subtitle text and timecodes in side panel.

VF-012.NAME: SettingsLLMPrompt
VF-012.scenario: User opens Settings → LLM tab, edits SYSTEM_PROMPT_REPHRASE, saves.
VF-012.expected-outcome: Edited prompt is saved to project.json and visible on reopen. Takes effect on next LLM processing call.

VF-013.NAME: BackendSelection
VF-013.scenario: User opens Settings → GPU/Backend tab, selects a backend.
VF-013.expected-outcome: Available backends are listed with CUDA availability. Selection saved to project config. Next detect run uses selected backend.

VF-014.NAME: MenuBarActions
VF-014.expected-outcome: All menu items present with correct shortcuts (Ctrl+N/O/S/Q). New/Open → file dialogs → project loaded. Close → project unloaded, UI reset. Save → project.json written. Import Video/Subtitles → project paths updated.

VF-015.NAME: ProjectAppSettings
VF-015.scenario: User opens Project Settings and App Settings from Edit menu.
VF-015.expected-outcome: Project Settings: all detection fields editable, saved to project.json. App Settings: LLM/GPU/snap_mode editable, saved to app-config.yaml. New projects created after app settings change inherit updated defaults.

VF-016.NAME: VideoPlaybackSubtitles
VF-016.scenario: User plays video with subtitle overlay in GUI.
VF-016.expected-outcome: Play/pause/stop work. Time counter updates. Seek slider seeks. Volume slider works. Subtitles render over video and sync with playback. No subtitles → clean video without overlay.

VF-017.NAME: TimelineGreenBlueMarkers
VF-017.scenario: User views detected slides as green markers, double-clicks to open image. User adds blue manual marker, snap adjusts it.
VF-017.expected-outcome: Green markers match slide intervals. Double-click opens image in system viewer. Right-click adds blue marker. Smart snap adjusts position per snap_mode. Marker persisted in project.json and restored on reopen.

VF-018.NAME: SmartSnapModes
VF-018.scenario: User places blue marker near a scene boundary with different snap modes.
VF-018.expected-outcome: diff_only: snaps using existing diff_scores. If none available, marker stays at original position. fallback_analyze: snaps using diff_scores if available, otherwise decodes and analyzes. hybrid: snaps using diff_scores, if graph flat runs high-res analysis. Snapped marker reflects actual scene change.

required-trace-assertions.assertion: test_models.py asserts VideoInfo rejects duration=-1.0 with pydantic.ValidationError.
test_models.py asserts Roi rejects negative coordinates and SlideSegment rejects confidence=1.5 via ValidationError.
test_models.py asserts SlidesDocument.model_validate raises ValidationError on negative video duration.
test_models.py asserts SlidesDocument JSON round-trip preserves slides[0].representative_timestamp == 40.0.

scenarios.scenario-1: Models fulfills its contract: Pydantic data models for slides document.
scenarios.scenario-2: Models rejects malformed input or surfaces a structured error when the contract is violated.

required-trace-assertions.assertion: test_config.py asserts VideoConfig rejects sample_fps=-1.0 and sample_fps=60.0 via ValidationError.
test_config.py asserts merge_config overrides video.sample_fps to 5.0 while preserving base decoder_backend.
test_config.py asserts load_config with CLI overrides yields cfg.video.sample_fps == 10.0 over YAML value 2.0.
test_config.py asserts AppConfig JSON round-trip preserves cfg.video.sample_fps == 0.5.

scenarios.scenario-1: Config fulfills its contract: Configuration loading — YAML file + CLI arg merge.
scenarios.scenario-2: Config rejects malformed input or surfaces a structured error when the contract is violated.

scenarios.scenario-1: Each successful OpenCV read increments frames_decoded exactly once.
scenarios.scenario-2: OpenCV conversions and RGB bytes equal yielded RGB frames exactly.
scenarios.scenario-3: PyAV counts every decoded frame while conversions and RGB bytes equal yielded frames exactly.
scenarios.scenario-4: PyAV keyframe filtering does not suppress decoded-frame counts.

scenarios.scenario-1: VideoDecode fulfills its contract: Video frame decoding and sampling at given fps with multi-backend support.

V-M-VIDEO-DECODE.blocked-reason: The recorded Windows/Python environment has PyAV available and selects PyAV for auto/fallback paths, while two tests in tests/test_video_decode.py expect OpenCV. The declared module-check is therefore not reproducibly green at the recorded HEAD. A separate decision is required: update backend-selection policy or make the tests environment-independent.

required-trace-assertions.assertion: test_frame_features.py asserts extract_features returns len(ff.hist) == 768 bins summing to ~3.0 on solid RGB input.
test_frame_features.py asserts visual_distance(ff, ff) == 0.0 and 0.0 <= dist <= 1.0 on random frames.
test_frame_features.py asserts compute_threshold([0.1, 0.2]) returns default 0.3 for short input lists.

scenarios.scenario-1: Governed ChangeEvent/detect_changes contracts and detect-init/process/debounce anchors remain uniquely paired and ordered.

required-trace-assertions.assertion: test_slide_detector.py asserts identical 128-value frames produce zero changes via detect_changes.
test_slide_detector.py asserts evidence_observer that mutates payload['image'] to 128 collapses detected changes to zero (trusted-intrusive hook contract).
test_slide_detector.py asserts src/video2pptx/slide_detector.py contains EVIDENCE_OBSERVER_CONTRACT, MUTABLE, and TRUSTED INTRUSIVE DIAGNOSTIC HOOK markers.
test_slide_detector.py asserts governed START_/END_ CONTRACT and BLOCK markers are paired and ordered in slide_detector.py source.
test_segmenter.py asserts choose_representative_timestamp(0.0, 10.0) == 8.0 (80% rule) and (0.0, 4.0) == 2.0 (50% rule).
test_segmenter.py asserts build_segments with no changes returns single segment 0.0-100.0 with confidence 0.9.
test_segmenter.py asserts build_segments filters segments shorter than min_slide_duration=3.0 (changes at 1.0s collapses to one segment).

scenarios.scenario-1: Segmenter fulfills its contract: Convert change events to slide intervals with representative timestamps.

required-trace-assertions.assertion: test_dedupe.py asserts deduplicate_segments merges two identical-frame segments into one with start=0.0, end=20.0.
test_dedupe.py asserts merged segments are reindexed so result[0].index == 1 and result[1].index == 2.
test_dedupe.py asserts merged segment preserves higher confidence value 0.95 from the second source segment.

scenarios.scenario-1: Dedupe fulfills its contract: Deduplicate adjacent slide segments via hash/SSIM similarity.

scenarios.scenario-1: diff_only with valid diff_scores: snaps to nearest peak within ±5s.
scenarios.scenario-2: diff_only with no diff_scores: returns original timestamp unchanged.
scenarios.scenario-3: fallback_analyze with no diff_scores: decodes window, computes differences, finds boundary.
scenarios.scenario-4: hybrid with flat diff_scores: falls back to high-res analysis.
scenarios.scenario-5: hybrid with clear diff_scores peak: uses diff_only path.

test_gui_smart_snap.py asserts _find_peak_in_window returns None when no scores fall within the window.
test_gui_smart_snap.py asserts smart_snap dispatches to diff_only/fallback_analyze/hybrid and unknown mode falls back to hybrid.

scenarios.scenario-2: Worker emits progress signals during execution.
scenarios.scenario-3: Error signal on missing video file.
scenarios.scenario-4: Worker can be cancelled via requestInterruption.

required-trace-assertions.assertion: Workers contract honored: QThread-based background workers for detect, quick-detect, notes, and LLM operations with progress signaling.
No production import from M-GUI-WORKER crosses a forbidden layer boundary.

evidence.result: tests/test_bootstrap.py: 13 passed (Stage 2 run). Application services compose without import cycles.

scenarios.scenario-1: Application bootstrap composes the service context without import cycles.
scenarios.scenario-2: Bootstrap surfaces missing dependency contracts as a structured error.

required-trace-assertions.assertion: test_bootstrap.py asserts ApplicationServices.context.repository is svc.repository (single shared context).
test_bootstrap.py asserts each service (_preview, _detect, _align, _notes, _export, _validate, _auto) is None until first access (lazy).
test_bootstrap.py asserts auto_service._preview/_detect/_align/_notes/_export/_validate reference the same singletons as svc.*_service.

evidence.result: tests/application/test_common.py: 19 passed (Stage 2 run). Application common helpers behave deterministically.

scenarios.scenario-1: ApplicationCommon helpers produce deterministic outputs for canonical inputs.
scenarios.scenario-2: Malformed input to common helpers raises a typed validation error.

required-trace-assertions.assertion: test_common.py asserts ServiceResult.ok('detect', data={'count': 3}, revision='rev-1') yields success=True with data and revision set.
test_common.py asserts ProgressUpdate rejects percent=-1 and percent=101 with ValueError.
test_common.py asserts CancellationToken.trigger() sets is_cancelled True and check('detect') raises CancellationError.

evidence.result: tests/gui/test_pipeline_controller.py: 12 passed (Stage 2 run). PipelineController routes commands deterministically.

scenarios.scenario-1: PipelineController routes detect/export commands to the correct worker.
scenarios.scenario-2: Controller suppresses duplicate commands while a pipeline is already running.

required-trace-assertions.assertion: test_pipeline_controller.py asserts run_detect forwards service-reported progress (42, 'Detected candidates') to controller.progress signal.
test_pipeline_controller.py asserts each stage method calls matching service.execute exactly once and emits stageFinished with ServiceResult.ok(stage).
test_pipeline_controller.py asserts ServiceResult.fail emits error signal and stageFinished is NOT emitted on error (len(finished_calls) == 0).

evidence.result: tests/gui/test_timeline_controller.py: 14 passed (Stage 2 run). TimelineController maps model changes to view updates.

scenarios.scenario-1: TimelineController maps slide model changes to view block updates.
scenarios.scenario-2: Controller rejects out-of-range selection indices with a stable no-op.

required-trace-assertions.assertion: test_timeline_controller.py asserts add_slide at 12.0 inside a real 3-slide project increases slide_count to 4 and emits slidesChanged.
test_timeline_controller.py asserts delete_slide(first_id) returns True and reduces reloaded slide_count from 3 to 2.
test_timeline_controller.py asserts move_slide with overlapping interval (5.0-15.0) returns False and emits errorOccurred.
test_timeline_controller.py asserts resize_slide persists interval.end == 7.0 after reload.

evidence.result: tests/test_benchmark_provenance.py: 14 passed (Stage 2 run). Benchmark provenance captured deterministically.

scenarios.scenario-1: Benchmark provenance captures canonical inputs and outputs deterministically.
scenarios.scenario-2: Benchmark with missing fixture raises a structured provenance error.

required-trace-assertions.assertion: test_benchmark_provenance.py asserts _validate_provenance_sha accepts full 40-char hex SHAs and rejects abbreviated, uppercase, and non-hex.
test_benchmark_provenance.py asserts _validate_provenance_sha with expected_type='commit' rejects known tree SHA with 'Expected git object type'.
test_benchmark_provenance.py asserts build_aggregate_evidence effective_config equals median_run.effective_config without benchmark_id or wall_clock_seconds contamination.

evidence.result: tests/test_github_release_provider.py: 11 passed (Stage 2 run). GitHubReleaseProvider handles mocked HTTP transport.

scenarios.scenario-1: GitHubReleaseProvider fetches and parses release metadata over mocked HTTP.
scenarios.scenario-2: Provider surfaces transport errors as a structured error without crashing.

required-trace-assertions.assertion: test_github_release_provider.py asserts fetch_releases on a 2-item mocked response returns releases ordered v0.6.0 then v0.5.0 with Version objects.
test_github_release_provider.py asserts HTTP 403/404/429/500 raises httpx.HTTPStatusError via mocked response.
test_github_release_provider.py asserts malformed tag 'not-a-version' raises ValueError with 'Invalid version tag'.

Gate-Phase-7.goal: detect-slides and notes commands work independently. detect (all-in-one) remains backwards compatible.

Gate-Phase-8.goal: roi-tool command opens window, selects region, prints coordinates.

Gate-Phase-9.goal: Project system: create, open, update, CLI round-trip. project.json schema stable.

Gate-Phase-10.goal: Desktop GUI: main window, timeline, settings, background workers. All tests pass in offscreen mode.

commands.command-1: QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen pytest tests/test_gui_main.py tests/test_gui_timeline.py tests/test_gui_settings.py tests/test_gui_workers.py -v

Gate-Phase-11.goal: Desktop GUI enhancements: menu bar, video player, subtitle overlay, enhanced timeline, project/app settings, app-wide config, smart snap. All new modules tested. Core pipeline unchanged.

commands.command-1: QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen pytest tests/test_gui_menu_bar.py tests/test_gui_video_player.py tests/test_gui_subtitle_overlay.py tests/test_gui_timeline_v2.py tests/test_gui_marker_manager.py tests/test_gui_smart_snap.py tests/test_gui_settings_project.py tests/test_gui_settings_app.py tests/test_gui_app_config.py -v
commands.command-2: pytest tests/ -x --tb=short # all existing tests still pass

Gate-Phase-12.goal: Domain model refactoring: ProjectModel + TimelineModel extracted from MainWindow. 15 model tests pass.

Gate-Phase-14.goal: Debug infrastructure: LogBridge, DebugDock (Ctrl+D), SignalSpy, MCP Server, ActionRegistry. 26 debug tests pass. All 454+ tests pass.

V-M-PERF-DETECT-BASELINE.purpose: Performance baseline instrumentation: DetectionRunMetrics schema, to_dict/from_dict round-trip, measure() context manager, per-frame timers/counters, backend counters (frames_decoded, ndarray_conversions, rgb_transfer_bytes), RssSampler peak RSS (rss_before_mb, rss_peak_mb, rss_after_mb), representative frame evidence (representative_frames, representative_frame_bytes).
V-M-PERF-DETECT-BASELINE.blocked-reason: Declared module-check `python -m pytest tests/test_detection_metrics.py -q` is not green in the recorded phase run: three TestPyAVMetrics cases fail because the fake stream/test double lacks stream.codec_context (STALE_PYAV_CODEC_CONTEXT_TEST_DOUBLE). No separate green targeted evidence covers those failures. Status cannot remain passed until the test doubles are updated or the contract is isolated from the failing surface.

evidence.result: Metrics typed round-trip PASS: to_dict() → from_dict() → exact values. measure() records time, inactive overhead negligible. RssSampler lifecycle recovery PASS requires deterministic start/document/persist/stop ordering, separate before-highest, sampled-highest, and after-highest peak cases, detector-work exception cleanup before document construction, and persistence-exception cleanup. Backend telemetry recovery PASS requires exact OpenCV and PyAV decoded-frame, conversion, RGB-transfer-byte, and PyAV keyframe-filter semantics plus container close on normal and decode/iteration failure paths. Fixture-backed benchmark contract evidence is not claimed in this recovery because F-0093 blocks execution. When the fixture is restored, the pending gate must verify: - timer_total > 0, timer_extract_features > 0 - frames_sampled (Pass 1 only) > 0 - pass2_frames_sampled (Pass 2) > 0 - features_full + features_quick == frames_sampled invariant - frames_decoded >= ndarray_conversions >= frames_sampled + pass2_frames_sampled - representative_frames > 0, representative_frame_bytes > 0 - rss_before_mb > 0 (when psutil available), rss_peak_mb >= max(rss_before_mb, rss_after_mb) - screenshots_written == actual PNG count - rgb_transfer_bytes > 0

V-M-PERF-DETECT-BOTTLENECK.purpose: Select a bottleneck class only from accepted recovered-tree benchmark evidence, or honestly report insufficient discrimination.
V-M-PERF-DETECT-BOTTLENECK.verification-contract: 1. Wall-clock stage timers from median run (run-01, 272.57s) are the primary evidence. 2. cProfile cumulative hierarchy is secondary — must resolve wall-clock overlap regions. 3. Candidate bottleneck classes (mutually exclusive, collectively exhaustive): - FEATURE_EXTRACTION_CPU - DECODE_FRAME_PIPELINE - PASS2_COLLECTION - THRESHOLD_OR_DECISION_LOGIC - MIXED_OR_UNRESOLVED 4. If evidence cannot safely discriminate one class, status=BLOCKED_INSUFFICIENT_DISCRIMINATION with no selected class and no optimization. 5. If a class IS selected, exactly one targeted optimization must be selected (name, code boundaries, hypothesis). 6. Acceptance gates must be defined for step 18.6 re-benchmark. 7. Verification artifacts: bottleneck_decision.json (machine-parseable), bottleneck_decision.md (human-readable rationale).

evidence.result: Bottleneck class: DECODE_FRAME_PIPELINE — SAFELY DISCRIMINATED. Confidence: HIGH. Selected optimization: NONE. F-0097 RESOLVED. F-0098 RESOLVED (activation-defect discrimination): canonical production-path evidence (Step 18.4A, codec_context_is_hwaccel=true) plus the corrected strict no-software-fallback control (Step 18.4B, FIRST_FRAME_DECODED, allow_software_fallback=false) establish that the current environment decodes at least one canonical H.264 frame through a CUDA HWAccel configuration with software fallback explicitly disabled. F-0100 RESOLVED (canonical clip located, copied local-only, not committed). Step 18.4A strict control = INVALID_SUPPORTING_CONTROL_IMPLEMENTATION_DEFECT (historical, raw 9b4cc STRICT_PROBE_NO_FRAME, no evidentiary weight) — CORRECTED in Step 18.4B: FIRST_FRAME_DECODED (packets_examined=3, frames_decoded=1, frames_converted=1, container_closed=true; strict-control code 04c0dc1f, raw evidence ef589a1, accepted master base 547dc06e). Bounded: does NOT prove all production decode was hardware, that production fallback never occurred, or any speedup. Production-path actual_hardware_decode_active remains UNKNOWN_NOT_PROVEN by observer design. PYAV_HWACCEL_CUDA: REJECTED_SOURCE_MODEL_MISMATCH — existing source already requests HWAccel. PYAV_HARDWARE_DECODE_ACTIVATION_OR_FALLBACK_FIX: CONTRADICTED_BY_STRICT_NO_FALLBACK_CONTROL. Step 18.4A=done (OBSERVATION_COMPLETE, OUTCOME_D). Step 18.4B=done (FIRST_FRAME_DECODED, OUTCOME_S1). Step 18.4=done: the accepted negative terminal outcome T3_NO_EVIDENCE_SUPPORTED_TARGET_OPTIMIZATION satisfies the contract — no tested C1/C2/C3 candidate satisfies the parity, stability, and performance gates, so selected_optimization=NONE (no targeted optimization is implemented). Median run (run-01): 272.57s detect elapsed. Residual: 0.53s (0.19%) — down from 87.39s (33.0%) pre-instrumentation. Total decoder/frame advancement pipeline (pass1 + pass2): 172.46s (63.27%). Canonical signature: 8cc06c6accb055fb6fed461f2f4a96f0b288ef864b9423000b6f59d9ab56bc85 ✓ Benchmark series: hermes-600s-f0097-instrumented-20260713-acb424f/run-{01,02,03} Benchmark code HEAD: acb424f904bc4b3459f6ad2ceb9f8c701cedb69b Evidence builder HEAD: acb424f904bc4b3459f6ad2ceb9f8c701cedb69b Recovered master base: 836a456eee0312646747d755dfe838052eaa6752 Step 18.6 output parity gates defined in bottleneck_decision.json step18_6_output_parity_gates. Optimization-specific performance gate: PENDING_SELECTED_OPTIMIZATION. Broad quality tolerances (missed_slide_rate <= 5%, false_split_rate <= 10%) remain under V-M-PERF-DETECT-ACCEPTANCE / Step 18.8 only. Artifacts: - benchmarks/detect/evidence/aggregate_evidence.json - benchmarks/detect/evidence/bottleneck_decision.json - benchmarks/detect/evidence/bottleneck_decision.md

V-M-PERF-DETECT-TARGET-OPTIMIZATION-DISC.purpose: Discriminate remaining DECODE_FRAME_PIPELINE optimization candidates (C1-C4) using source semantics, exact frame parity, resource evidence, and focused microbenchmarks.

verification-contract.scenario-1: Three fresh production-equivalent complete sampled decodes classify exact cross-open byte repeatability from direct timestamp, shape, RGB hash, and complete signatures.
verification-contract.scenario-2: The C2 model records exact admission, eviction, six-second transition, strict tolerance, accepted-boundary handling, proof, complexity, and canonical peak resource measurements.
verification-contract.scenario-3: Live C3 inspection deterministically selects at most three variants from recorded fields and hard-fails eligible-boundary/zero-variant contradictions.
verification-contract.scenario-4: Stop terminal discrimination when baseline reference nondeterminism invalidates cross-open exact-byte gates; do not invent a tolerance.
verification-contract.scenario-5: Reject canonical SHA mismatch, abbreviated/non-commit/non-ancestor accepted bases, child/aggregate contradictions, duplicate JSON keys, or dirty evidence-code execution.
verification-contract.required-evidence: reference_repeatability.json, c1_status.json, c2_retention_model.json, c3_inspection.json, c3_variants.json, discrimination_evidence.json, discrimination_report.md, environment.json, plus conditional parity/run artifacts.
verification-contract.commands: python -m pytest tests/test_target_optimization_discrimination.py -v; ruff check changed Python; duplicate-key JSON validation; strict XML parsing; git diff --check
verification-contract.stop-condition: Do not produce a terminal candidate decision until committed clean correction code emits all applicable child artifacts and the aggregate agrees with them.

evidence.result: PASSED. The b869464/4b6eba5 package is REJECTED_FOR_STEP_18_4C_ACCEPTANCE because of C3_CODE_ARTIFACT_PROVENANCE_CONTRADICTION, unsupported C1 causality, and a C2 retain-all upper bound mislabeled as a required minimum. C1 0/84 and the 7,471,180,800-byte arithmetic remain historical observations only. C1 causal classification is UNKNOWN_NOT_ISOLATED (codec_context_causal=false; the stream.codec_context code-path difference is a leading hypothesis, NOT an isolated cause). Outcome T3 and C3 NO_EVIDENCE_SUPPORTED_CONFIGURATION_VARIANT are not accepted. F-0102 is rejected draft context. Corrected evidence code 0bcfe540c62b5d1130ba2dbb3d067c46234062bb, tree a55759461374ac747b1e87e1611c544ce59ca969, raw commit b4ed0e40c2f9d86c0db41c2dd53106f945f2502c. REFERENCE_EXACTLY_REPEATABLE validates exact cross-open discrimination. C1=NOT_VIABLE_EXACT_PARITY_FAIL with causal classification UNKNOWN_NOT_ISOLATED. C2 exact rolling model/semantics pass, peak 15 frames / 93,312,000 bytes, but performance fails (difference of medians -40.19553279999673s / -13.835416931263438%; median of paired differences -46.81963299999916s / -16.115451096192%; unstable). C3 selection PASS with thread_count_1/4/8; all exact parity PASS and all performance FAIL. Management outcome: the negative terminal outcome T3_NO_EVIDENCE_SUPPORTED_TARGET_OPTIMIZATION is accepted — no tested candidate is viable. F-0103 OPEN / NON_BLOCKING (ROOT_CAUSE_UNKNOWN_NOT_ISOLATED; codec_context is a leading hypothesis, not an isolated cause; environment contribution not excluded). selected_optimization=NONE; Step 18.4=done; Step 18.4C=done; Step 18.5 planned/blocked and not started (implementation_started=false). Canonical signature provenance: 8cc06c6a... (original) vs 5a7c4538... (current); match=false; provenance classification ROOT_CAUSE_UNKNOWN_NOT_ISOLATED. The historical benchmark path at acb424f did not access stream.codec_context while the current path does — a proven code-path difference and leading hypothesis; causality NOT isolated (no controlled A/B varied ONLY that access). C2 taxonomy corrected: NOT_VIABLE_PERFORMANCE_FAIL (not NOT_VIABLE_RESOURCE_MODEL). Median terminology clarified: median_of_paired_differences vs difference_of_medians explicitly separated.

required-trace-assertions.assertion: test_target_optimization_discrimination.py asserts compute_median/mean/sample_stdev/paired_absolute_savings produce exact canonical arithmetic results.
test_target_optimization_discrimination.py asserts check_frame_parity detects single-byte, timestamp, missing-target, and shape mismatches.

test_target_optimization_discrimination.py asserts bottleneck_decision.json carries outcome='T3', terminal_outcome='T3_NO_EVIDENCE_SUPPORTED_TARGET_OPTIMIZATION', selected_optimization='NONE', while raw discrimination_evidence.json retains immutable outcome='PENDING'.

scenarios.scenario-2: TargetOptimizationDiscriminationR2 rejects malformed input or surfaces a structured error when the contract is violated.

V-M-ANALYSIS-SCALE.purpose: Unit contract for analysis downscale helper and VideoConfig.analysis_max_side schema.

verification-contract.scenario-1: scale_for_analysis with max_side=None returns identical array (or equal content) and scale_factor=1.0.
verification-contract.scenario-2: max_side smaller than both dimensions produces max(H,W)==max_side and preserved aspect within 1px.
verification-contract.scenario-3: max_side larger than frame does not upscale (identity).
verification-contract.scenario-4: Invalid analysis_max_side (negative, non-int) rejected by config validation.
verification-contract.scenario-5: Default analysis_max_side is null/None — native parity with pre-Phase-19 behavior.

evidence.result: PASSED 2026-07-18: pytest tests/test_analysis_scale.py tests/test_config.py — scale identity, no-upscale, landscape/portrait max_side, config default None, rejects 0/negative.

required-trace-assertions.assertion: test_analysis_scale asserts no-upscale and aspect preservation.
test_config asserts analysis_max_side default None and rejects negative values.

scenarios.scenario-1: AnalysisScale fulfills identity / downscale / no-upscale contracts.
scenarios.scenario-2: Invalid config rejected.

V-M-DETECT-ANALYSIS-SCALE.purpose: Dual-resolution detect path: Pass1 analysis scale; Pass2 full-res screenshots.

verification-contract.scenario-1: With analysis_max_side set, detect completes and metrics report analysis dimensions ≤ max_side.
verification-contract.scenario-2: Written PNG screenshots match native ROI crop size (full-res invariant).
verification-contract.scenario-3: analysis_max_side=None preserves prior two-pass detect semantics on fixture video (segment count stable within existing tests).
verification-contract.scenario-4: If scale were incorrectly applied to Pass2 writes, test asserts PNG shape != expected native crop and fails.

evidence.result: PASSED 2026-07-18: analysis_max_side=64 on fixture yields metrics width=64 scale_factor<1; PNG shape equals native 640x480; iter_frames called twice.

required-trace-assertions.assertion: Detect tests assert Pass2 screenshot full-res invariant when analysis_max_side is set.
Detect path still calls decoder.iter_frames exactly twice (two-pass preserved).

scenarios.scenario-1: Dual-res path works with scaled analysis and full-res PNG.
scenarios.scenario-2: Full-res invariant violation is detected by tests.

V-M-GOLDEN-MEAN-SWEEP.purpose: Sweep tool emits grid evidence with quality metrics vs native reference and real wall-clock/stage timers.

verification-contract.scenario-1: Tool accepts grid of analysis_max_side × sample_fps and writes per-cell JSON.
verification-contract.scenario-2: Each cell records wall_clock, slides_count, missed_slide_rate, false_split_rate, timestamp_error.
verification-contract.scenario-3: Reference cell is native max_side + baseline sample_fps on same code HEAD.
verification-contract.scenario-4: Missing reference or empty video path fails with structured error (non-zero exit).

required-trace-assertions.assertion: Sweep schema includes analysis_max_side, sample_fps, and quality gate fields.

scenarios.scenario-1: Sweep produces complete grid artifacts on fixture video.
scenarios.scenario-2: Invalid inputs rejected.

V-M-GOLDEN-MEAN-DECISION.purpose: Select golden-mean defaults under hard gates or accept selected_analysis_scale=NONE.

verification-contract.scenario-1: Decision artifact lists selected analysis_max_side and sample_fps when a gate-passing cell exists.
verification-contract.scenario-2: If no cell passes gates, selected_analysis_scale=NONE with explicit negative terminal rationale.
verification-contract.scenario-3: Tie-break: among passers prefer higher speedup, then higher max_side, then higher sample_fps.
verification-contract.scenario-4: Decision explicitly does not modify Phase 18 selected_optimization=NONE.

evidence.result: PASSED 2026-07-18 Hermes decision: selected_analysis_scale=480, sample_fps=2.0, wall_reduction_pct≈53.6, extract_features_reduction_pct≈93.4, phase18_reopened=false. 960/640/320 rejected on false_split_rate=0.33 vs native 4-slide reference. See benchmarks/detect/evidence/phase19-hermes-600s-20260718/golden_mean_decision.md.

evidence.result: PASSED 2026-07-18. Hermes decision analysis_max_side=480 (~2.15× wall, extract −93%, gates PASS). Runtime default set to 480; explicit None still works. Full-res PNG invariant tested. Phase 18 bottleneck decision artifacts unchanged. Phase-19 status=done.

required-trace-assertions.assertion: Phase 19 acceptance does not alter Phase 18 bottleneck decision artifacts.
VideoConfig default analysis_max_side == 480.

scenarios.scenario-2: Full-res or quality gate failure blocks acceptance.
